name: Josera Denties With Poultry & Blueberry 180g
description: Your dog is naturally inclined to love chewing! This can be used to help support your dog’s daily oral care, encouraging cleanliness and hygiene. These Josera Denties with Poultry & Blueberry have a clever star-shaped structure that can help to reduce the amount of plaque and tartar as your dog chews. They also contain cellulose, which can further enhance this effect. Ingredients: Vegetable by-products (dried potato, dried tapioca, cellulose), dried poultry protein (14%), blueberry puree (4%), hydrolyzed poultry protein, minerals. Analytical constituents: protein 12.0 % fat 2.0 % fibre 4.0 % ash 6.5 % moisture 24.0 % Feeding recommendation: Josera Denties with Poultry & Carrot is a supplementary food for adult dogs. Dog’s weight Serving in sticks per day 10kg 0.5 25kg 1.5 35kg 2 Feed in addition to a complete diet. Be sure to factor treats into your dog’s daily nutritional intake. Ensure fresh drinking water is always available. Josera Denties with Poultry & Blueberry at a glance: Fruity chew snack for adult dogs Delicious: with blueberry puree and delicious poultry Palate-friendly star shape: can support tooth cleaning and massage the gums With cellulose: texture can help with oral hygiene With dried tapioca: well-tolerated source of carbohydrates Provides valuable minerals Well digestible: grain-free Quality from Germany
